mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId , SITE_ID AS siteId , LOGIN_ID AS loginId , PASSWORD AS password , MEMBER_NAME AS memberName , AUTH_LEVEL AS authLevel , EMAIL AS email , USE_YN AS useYn , REG_DT AS regDt , MOD_DT AS modDt , REG_USER AS regUser , DEPT_ID AS deptId FROM MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId , SITE_ID AS siteId , LOGIN_ID AS loginId , PASSWORD AS password , MEMBER_NAME AS memberName , AUTH_LEVEL AS authLevel , EMAIL AS email , USE_YN AS useYn , REG_DT AS regDt , MOD_DT AS modDt , REG_USER AS regUser , DEPT_ID AS deptId FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
